ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate entry */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month and year for which the tax rate applies */,
  "combined_tax_rate" REAL /* Combined tax rate (sum of state, county, and city taxes) */,
  "state_tax_rate" REAL /* State tax rate */,
  "county_tax_rate" REAL /* County tax rate */,
  "city_tax_rate" REAL /* City tax rate */,
  "special_tax_rate" REAL /* Special tax rate */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the jurisdiction where the tax rate applies */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax rate became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax rate ended (null if still active) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the tax rate entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the tax rate entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tax rate entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tax rate entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rates_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jurisdictions" (
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jurisdiction */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the jurisdiction */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the jurisdiction is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the jurisdiction is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the jurisdiction is located */,
  "special_district" TEXT /* Special district where the jurisdiction is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the jurisdiction */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the jurisdiction */,
  "economic_data" TEXT /* Economic data for the jurisdiction */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the jurisdiction's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the jurisdiction's location */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the jurisdiction entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the jurisdiction entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the jurisdiction entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the jurisdiction entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_types" (
  "tax_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax type */,
  "tax_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax type */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the tax type entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the tax type entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tax type entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tax type entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rate_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical tax rate entry */,
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax rate entry */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax rate became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax rate ended (null if still active) */,
  "rate_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rate change */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the historical tax rate entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the historical tax rate entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical tax rate entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical tax rate entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rate_history_tax_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("tax_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_exemptions" (
  "exemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax exemption */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity receiving the exemption */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the jurisdiction where the exemption applies */,
  "tax_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax type for which the exemption applies */,
  "exemption_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the exemption */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the exemption */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the exemption */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the tax exemption entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the tax exemption entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tax exemption entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tax exemption entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_exemptions_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_exemptions_tax_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_type_id") REFERENCES tax_types ("tax_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tax official, analyst, auditor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the tax rate data */,
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax rate data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax rate data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the access log entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the access log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tax_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("tax_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., historical, trend analysis) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the report entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rate_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate change */,
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax rate being changed */,
  "proposed_date" TEXT /* Date the change was proposed */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the change was approved (null if not approved) */,
  "rejected_date" TEXT /* Date the change was rejected (null if not rejected) */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the change */,
  "rejected_by" TEXT /* User who rejected the change */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the tax rate change entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the tax rate change entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tax rate change entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tax rate change entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rate_changes_tax_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("tax_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rate_changes_rejected_by FOREIGN KEY ("rejected_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rate_changes_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rate_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate change request */,
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax rate being requested for a change */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "requested_by" TEXT /* User who made the request */,
  "request_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the request */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the request */,
  "rejected_by" TEXT /* User who rejected the request */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the request */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the tax rate request entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the tax rate request entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tax rate request entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tax rate request entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rate_requests_rejected_by FOREIGN KEY ("rejected_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rate_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rate_requests_tax_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("tax_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event triggering the notification (e.g., tax rate change) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification */,
  "sent_by" TEXT /* User who sent the notification */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the notification entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the notification entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event recorded in the audit trail (e.g., login, tax rate change) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* User who performed the action */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the audit trail entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the audit trail entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit trail entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit trail entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the system setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the system setting */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the system setting entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the system setting entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system setting entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system setting entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
